title: Tangy Crispy Mexican Peanuts Quesadilla
description: A vibrant, vegetarian Mexican quesadilla bursting with tangy lime, crunchy peanuts, and a buttery, crispy finish. Perfect for a showoff snack or light lunch.

ingredients.name: creamy peanut butter
ingredients.notes: smooth or crunchy; thin with 1 tsp water if too thick

ingredients.name: shredded cheddar or pepper jack cheese

instructions: In a small bowl whisk together peanut butter, agave, lime juice, cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne until smooth. Add 1 tsp water if mixture is too thick.
Spread 2 tbsp of the peanut mixture on one side of each tortilla, leaving a 1‑inch border.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro, shredded cheese, and chopped peanuts over the spread. Top with another tortilla, peanut side down.
Heat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat and add 1 tbsp melted butter. Place the quesadilla in the skillet.
Cook 3‑4 minutes until the bottom is golden and the tortilla is crisp. Flip carefully with a spatula.
Cook another 3‑4 minutes, pressing gently until the cheese melts and the tortilla is evenly crisp.
Remove from skillet, let rest 1 minute, then cut into wedges.
Serve with lime wedges and a drizzle of extra peanut sauce if desired.
